[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01010010 3
1 01011111 6
2 10110101 5
3 11000001 3
4 10110101 5
5 11100011 5
6 00000000 a
7 10101111 6

01 10 00101011 4
12 21 01010010 3 match 0
23 32 01010010 3 match 0
34 43 00010101 3
45 54 10000001 2
56 65 10000001 2
67 76 10100001 3
70 07 10100011 4

02 20 00000010 1
13 31 01011011 5
24 42 00010000 1
35 53 01000001 2
46 64 10110101 5 match 2 4
57 75 11000001 3 match 3
60 06 10100101 4
71 17 01100011 4

03 30 00001111 4
14 41 00110001 3
25 52 01000000 1
36 63 00010101 3
47 74 10100001 3
50 05 10000001 2
61 16 00110001 3
72 27 01000010 2

15 51 01000001 2
26 62 00010000 1
37 73 01000011 3
